heading: Common Modifications
rows: Define the interface in content.ts, create a new renderer component, add a case to BlockRenderer.tsx
Create or extend a blueprint, add a service function, update apiClient.ts
Create the slice file, add it to combineReducers in store.ts, add to whitelist if persistence needed
Create messages/<locale>.json, add locale to routing.ts locales array
Add objects to exam_questions.json with id, text, options, correctOptionId, explanation, category, difficulty
Add objects to glossary_terms.json with term, definition, category
Set NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL as a runtime env var (e.g., in docker-compose.yml environment), run docker compose up --build
